The '''''Ion Storm''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]].

==History==
Well before [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the ''Ion Storm'' was once commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jaim Helaw]]. During this time [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Conan Antonio Motti]] also served onboard the vessel, upon his promotion to [[First Lieutenant/Legends|first lieutenant]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ship was deployed to the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]] and the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], where it answered to [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Newen Streeg]] and served as the flagship of his modest fleet. At this time it was commanded by Captain [[Barse Neomen]], or, whenever the captain was away, by second-in-command [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Surlev]].

==Behind the scenes==
It is possible that the ''Ion Storm'' as mentioned in [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] is a different ship to the ''Strike''-cruiser by the same name, given that ''Strike''-class cruisers entered service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It is possible that the earlier vessel was destroyed or decommissioned and then later recommissioned as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship of the new class during the [[Rebellion era]].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{Mo}}
